title: erythroxylum ovalifolium
intro: Erythroxylum ovalifolium, also known as the oval-leaf coca plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, due to the presence of alkaloids such as corynanthine and corynoxeine. The health benefits of Erythroxylum ovalifolium include its potential use in the treatment of altitude sickness, anemia, and other conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other herbs to create herbal preparations.
